layout.structure: Single-column layout with distinct card-based sections. Max-width 800px for form readability.
layout.navigation: Sticky header with progress indication or simple branding.

buttons.base: h-12 px-6 font-medium transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95

inputs.base: h-12 px-4 bg-white border border-[#e2e6ed] focus:border-[#1d7a72] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1d7a72]/20 transition-all outline-none placeholder:text-[#8892a4]

cards.base: bg-white border border-[#e2e6ed] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

activity_toggles.item: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 border-2 border-[#e2e6ed] rounded-[20px] cursor-pointer transition-all hover:border-[#1d7a72]/50

visual_enhancers.motion: Use 'framer-motion' for smooth section entry (opacity: 0 -> 1, y: 20 -> 0).
visual_enhancers.illustrations: Use clean, minimalist SVG icons or Lucide icons for activities. Avoid cluttered stock photos.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the custom colors and border radius variables immediately.
2. FONTS: Import 'Georgia' (system font usually available) and 'Helvetica Neue' (fallback to Arial/Sans). Ensure headings use Georgia.
3. COMPONENTS: Create a reusable 'SectionCard' component that encapsulates the white background, 20px radius, and padding.
4. FORMS: Use 'react-hook-form' + 'zod' for validation. This is critical for medical forms.
5. AIRTABLE: Mock the Airtable search for now with a static list of prosthetic components (e.g., 'Foot - Sach', 'Knee - Polycentric', 'Hand - Myoelectric'). Create a 'Combobox' component for this.
6. ACTIVITIES: Create a 'ToggleCard' component for the daily activities. It should visually change state (border color + bg color) when selected.
7. PDF: Use 'react-to-print' or 'jspdf' to generate a summary of the patient form.
9. LANGUAGE: All text MUST be in French.
10. DATA-TESTID: Add 'data-testid' to all inputs (e.g., 'input-name', 'input-amputation-date') and buttons.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds; stick to the solid #f8f9fc.
Ensure high contrast for text (use the provided #1a1f2e for primary text).
Use generous padding inside cards (p-6 or p-8) to avoid a cramped look.
Input fields should have a height of 48px (h-12) for better touch targets.
Feedback is key: Show success toast after saving.
Do not use 'Inter' font; strictly follow the Georgia/Helvetica rule.
